title: Rotational Kinetic Energy of the Earth
body: Model the Earth as a uniform solid sphere of mass $$5.97\times{10}^{24}$$ kg and radius $$6.37\times{10}^6$$ $$m$$ (I=(2/5)*M*R**2). It spins once per day (8.64*10**4 s) and orbits the Sun once per year (3.156*10**7 s) at an orbital radius of $$1.5\times{10}^{11}$$ $$m$$.
